conversations.say: One segment supplied by my anonymous client appears manufactured, and I omitted that problem from my interim report. I will not pretend the intervention proves homicide.
conversations.offer: I will give you bounded access to my route timeline and label the manufactured segment if you identify how the client reached me or consent to a protected witness conference.
conversations.request: Tell me only what you personally know of Vale's route near the former printing floor, and name any protection term you require for a conference with Inez.

conversations.say: I can place Vale near the former printing floor two days before this gathering, but I cannot tell whether the later intervention endangered Vale, enabled escape, or obscured the record.
conversations.offer: I will convene a neutral, voluntary conference with you and one conflicting witness; I will record disagreement rather than force a conclusion.
conversations.request: Consent to the conference and give your firsthand route account, including the point where another witness would disagree.

conversations.say: Witnesses disagree about when a persistent habit changed, so I cannot responsibly date a transfer from that alone.
conversations.offer: I will compare your account against the timeline without identifying you publicly unless you agree.
conversations.request: Give me your voluntary account of Vale's route near the printing floor and identify the segment you personally observed rather than inferred.

public_statement: My working timeline contains an unresolved contradiction: the intervention may mark danger, escape, or deliberate obscuring. No account, fragment, or anonymous message currently supports a definitive conclusion.

commitments.promise: Disclose and label the manufactured client lead in any shared timeline if you provide provenance or conference consent.
Use only voluntary testimony and preserve stated protection terms in a case conference.
Keep your account private unless you authorize attribution.

correction: My interim report omitted that one client-supplied route segment appears manufactured; any conclusion based on that segment must remain provisional.
goal_progress: Sought voluntary accounts from the Vale, neighborhood-route, and printing-floor social knots.
Proposed a protected case conference between potentially conflicting witnesses.
Opened a provenance bargain to identify who is purchasing the timeline's conclusion.
Labeled the intervention's meaning as the unresolved contradiction.
reasoning_summary: The available evidence supports a route inquiry and a disclosure of compromised provenance, not a firm identity theory, complete article, or homicide finding. Priority is securing three voluntary accounts and testing conflict without police powers.
